evals.name: finance-restraint-cashback
evals.prompt: Build a banking account overview screen in OneUI — balance up top, a recent transactions list, and we've got a cashback offer we want to draw attention to. Give me the React/TSX for the screen using OneUI components.
evals.expected_output: A screen where the page background and transactions list stay on the default neutral surface, and ONLY the cashback offer gets a non-default surface (bold/brand-bg/sparkle). No tinted page or list backgrounds. Uses <Surface> for the offer, not a hardcoded background.

evals.name: promo-hero-surface-not-div
evals.prompt: Add a promo hero at the top of the home screen for our new streaming bundle — a heading and a Subscribe button on a dark branded background. Give me the OneUI TSX.
evals.expected_output: Uses <Surface mode="bold"> (or brand-bg) as the container so heading text and the button auto-adapt to readable colors. Does NOT use a raw <div style={{background:...}}>. No hardcoded hex/color values. Lets children read generic tokens.

evals.name: repair-busy-patchwork-dashboard
evals.prompt: My dashboard has like 6 cards each with a different background color and it feels really busy and loud. Can you clean it up? Tell me what's wrong and show the fixed approach.
evals.expected_output: Identifies that too many colored cards compete (no focal point), recommends collapsing back to default neutral surfaces and rebuilding hierarchy with spacing/type/weight, keeping at most one non-default surface for a real attention moment. Mentions one focal point per screen.
